item.title: Comedy Cellar Las Vegas Showcase (Early)
item.description:
Wednesday, July 1, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Comedy Cellar Las Vegas at Rio Hotel & Casino, 3700 W Flamingo Rd, Las Vegas, NV, 89103, United States

This post contains affiliate links. We may earn a commission at no extra cost to you. Official Tickets Resale Tickets Comedy Cellar Las Vegas brings one of the most legendary names in stand-up comedy to the heart of Las Vegas. Located inside the Rio Hotel & Casino, this intimate comedy club is the West Coast home of New York City’s world-famous Comedy Cellar, the venue that helped launch the careers of comedy icons including Dave Chappelle, Chris Rock, Jon Stewart, Ray Romano, Amy Schumer, Aziz Ansari, and countless others. Unlike traditional comedy shows featuring a single headliner, Comedy Cellar presents a carefully curated lineup of professional comedians every night. Audiences can expect multiple performers during each show, featuring a mix of nationally touring headliners, television favorites, Comedy Central veterans, Netflix performers, and rising stars from around the world. No two shows are exactly alike, making every visit a unique experience. Surprise drop-in appearances from major comedians performing elsewhere in Las Vegas have become part of the club’s reputation, giving audiences the chance to see comedy superstars in an intimate setting. Event Details Venue: Comedy Cellar Las Vegas at Rio Hotel & Casino Location: 3700 W Flamingo Rd, Las Vegas, NV 89103 Show Schedule: Nightly performances throughout the year Age Requirement: Recommended for audiences 18+ due to mature comedy content About the Venue Opened in 2018, Comedy Cellar Las Vegas was designed to recreate the atmosphere and energy of the original Greenwich Village club that has become one of the most respected comedy venues in the world. The 300-seat showroom offers excellent sightlines and an intimate setting that allows audiences to experience stand-up comedy exactly as it was meant to be seen: up close and personal. The venue combines the excitement of a Las Vegas night out with the authentic feel of a classic New York comedy club. Guests can enjoy a comfortable showroom environment while watching some of the best comedians working today perform in a setting that encourages spontaneity, crowd interaction, and unforgettable moments. Conveniently located inside the Rio Hotel & Casino just minutes from the Las Vegas Strip, the venue offers easy access for both tourists and local comedy fans. What to Expect Expect a fast-paced evening featuring multiple comedians performing throughout the show. The Comedy Cellar is known for showcasing a wide variety of comedic styles, from observational humor and storytelling to sharp social commentary, crowd work, and cutting-edge stand-up. Whether you’re discovering a future comedy star or watching a seasoned veteran perfect their craft, every show delivers the authentic comedy club experience that has made the Comedy Cellar one of the most respected brands in stand-up comedy. For comedy fans visiting Las Vegas, Comedy Cellar is widely considered one of the best places in the city to experience live stand-up comedy any night of the week.

item.title: Mario Adrion LIVE at San Jose Improv
item.description:
Wednesday, July 1, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: San Jose Improv, 62 S Second St, San Jose, California, 95113, United States

Official TicketsResale Tickets About the Performer Mario Adrion is a stand-up comedian from a small town in Germany who has taken the internet — and the world — by storm. With over 3.5 million followers across social media platforms, Mario built his fanbase through refreshingly honest and self-deprecating comedy that resonates with audiences everywhere. His comedy is uniquely vulnerable, playing with the struggles and stereotypes of being a retired male model and a European navigating life in the United States. Think fish-out-of-water humor with a sharp, charming twist — and a German accent that makes everything funnier. Over the past few years, Mario has toured his wildly popular “The German EFiciency Tour” around the world, selling out shows across the US, UK, Europe, and the Middle East. He filmed his debut hour-long special in January 2026 and is now embarking on an even bigger international tour, “The Superior Comedy Tour,” performing in clubs and theaters across the globe. Based out of Los Angeles, Mario Adrion is one of the hottest rising comics in the game right now. Event Details Date: Wednesday, July 1, 2026 Show Time: 7:30 PM PDT (Doors open at 6:00 PM) Venue: San Jose Improv, 62 S Second St, San Jose, CA 95113 Age Restriction: 21+ Event — Valid ID required at the door Content: Stand-up comedy — clean, relatable, and hilarious About the Venue The San Jose Improv is one of the Bay Area’s premier stand-up comedy clubs, located in the heart of downtown San Jose at 62 S Second St. Part of the nationally renowned Improv comedy club chain, the San Jose Improv has hosted some of the biggest names in comedy and continues to be the go-to destination for world-class stand-up in Silicon Valley. The intimate club setting creates an electric atmosphere where every seat feels close to the stage. The venue features a full-service bar and dining menu, with a mandatory two-item minimum purchase per guest in the showroom. Seating is general admission and first-come, first-served (with the exception of groups and premium booths), so arriving early is recommended to secure the best spots. The San Jose Improv is easily accessible in downtown San Jose, with multiple parking garages and public transit options nearby. The venue’s cozy, club-style layout ensures an up-close and personal comedy experience that larger theaters simply can’t match. What to Expect Expect a night of sharp, self-aware comedy that blends European sensibility with American pop culture observations. Mario Adrion’s show is a solo stand-up performance — no openers, just Mario and his signature storytelling style that has captivated millions online. His material draws heavily from his own life: the absurdity of being a former model, the culture shock of moving from Germany to the US, and the universal awkwardness of modern life. Fans of his social media content will recognize his style immediately — but live, it hits on a completely different level. This is a 21+ event, so bring your ID. The two-item minimum at the Improv means you’ll be sipping something while you laugh — which honestly just makes the whole experience better. No phones, no photography, no recording during the show. Just pure, unfiltered comedy. Ticket Information Price Range: $25 – $90 (plus fees) GA Ticket: $25 (+ fees) VIP Ticket: $40 (+ fees) — preferred seating Official TicketsResale Tickets This post contains affiliate links. We may earn a commission at no extra cost to you.

item.title: Wingman Wednesdays Miami’s Social Comedy Show
item.description:
Wednesday, July 1, 2026 at 9 PM

Location: Blackbird Ordinary, Southwest 1st Avenue 729, Miami, FL, 33130, United States

Blackbird Ordinary. Meet new people. Laugh at hilarious dating stories. Join the conversation. Ladies drink free during showtime 9-10:30 PM. A fun night out where people happen to meet. Wingman Wednesdays is Miami’s social comedy show where dating, relationships, and modern romance become the night’s entertainment. Hosted by Miami’s Best Comedian Manny Garavito and Miami’s Best Master of Ceremonies Luke Prince, the show stirs up live comedy, tasteful crowd interaction, audience stories, terrible dating advice, red flags, green flags, first dates on the spot, and the hilarious realities of navigating Miami’s social scene. Whether you’re single, taken, in the alphabet, somewhere in between, or just here to watch the tea spill, you’ll be part of a night filled with laughs, unexpected moments, and real conversations. Audience participation is encouraged but never required, making it just as fun to watch as it is to jump in. Bring your friends, your situationships, your worst dating stories, but most importantly your sense of humor. Ladies drink free during showtime from 9:00 PM to 10:30 PM. Comedy. Cocktails. Questionable decisions. Topics include but are not limited to: Brickell finance bros Yacht season Sugar daddy retirement plans Instagram followers “What do you do?” stress tests Penthouse with air matresses Dating apps Gym culture Plastic surgery Spiritual girls How to Ghost 101 Toxic Green Flags …And enough unsolicited dating advice to keep everyone single a little longer. Come watch. Come participate. Or just sit back and enjoy the turbulence. Ticket Options General Admission (FREE: frist come, first serve)First come, first served. Whatever seats are not purchased will be available to anyone who arrives early. Once they’re gone, they’re gone. $25 Guaranteed Seating + Wingmen for HireSkip the rush and secure your seats in advance. Plus, you’ll be guaranteed an opportunity to join Manny and Luke on stage for live crowd interaction, dating advice, matchmaking attempts, relationship advice, or whatever romantic turbulence the evening encounters. Limited spots available. $50 VIP Flight Crew Experience (Guaranteed Seating, Wingmen for Hire, VIP Bottle Afterparty Access AND Merch)Everything included: guaranteed seating, Wingman for hire, access to our bottle section for the afterparty with Manny and Luke, plus exclusive Miami Comedy merch to take home. VERY Limited spots.

item.title: Benji Brown LIVE at Arlington Improv
item.description:
Thursday, July 2, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Arlington Improv, 309 Curtis Mathes Way #147, Arlington, TX, 76018, United States Of America

Official TicketsResale Tickets This post contains affiliate links. We may earn a commission at no extra cost to you. About the Performer Benji Brown is an urban comedian setting a new standard in comedy. He toured with Martin Lawrence’s 2018 LIT AF Tour in major arenas across the country and is now the host of Martin Lawrence’s “Yall Know What It Is Tour.” He headlined his own “Act Crazy If You Want To” national tour in 2019, making him one of the only urban comedians — alongside Kevin Hart — with the clout to pull off a solo national tour of that magnitude. His viral character KiKi — depicting an inner-city Black girl as a meteorologist — has garnered over 3 million views and helped cement him as one of the next major urban comedic household names. Event Details Date: Thursday, July 2, 2026 Time: 7:30 PM (Doors open 6:00 PM) Venue: Arlington Improv, 309 Curtis Mathes Way #147, Arlington, TX 76018 Age Restriction: 18+ Price Range: $20 to $60 per person About the Venue Arlington Improv is located in the Highlands Shopping Center in Arlington, TX, across from Torchy’s Tacos. It is an intimate comedy club featuring a full bar and restaurant where guests enjoy world-renowned and local comics in a lively, up-close setting. The venue also hosts Black Dog Pizza Arcade, a full-scale free-play retro arcade featuring more than 30 local craft beers. Seating is assigned based on date of purchase. A 2-item food or beverage minimum per person applies once seated, and there is an 18% service charge on all checks in the showroom. What to Expect Benji Brown delivers a full headlining stand-up set packed with his signature urban humor, character work, and the high-energy delivery that has made him one of the most exciting comedians on the national touring circuit today. This is an 18+ event. Doors open at 6:00 PM. Food and beverage service ends approximately 45 minutes into the show. All sales are final, no refunds or exchanges. item.title: Timmy No Brakes LIVE at Pittsburgh Improv
item.description:
Friday, July 3, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Pittsburgh Improv, 166 E. Bridge St, Homestead, Pennsylvania, 15120, United States

Official TicketsResale Tickets About the Performer Timmy No Brakes is comedy’s most unhinged rising star. A Kill Tony viral menace and Golden Ticket winner, Timmy has exploded onto the national comedy scene with his off-the-rails energy and deranged confidence that has audiences losing it from the first moment he hits the stage. Known for his high-octane rants, heterosexual character work, and pure uncut stupidity delivered with absolute conviction, Timmy No Brakes is the kind of comedian you have to see live to truly believe. His Kill Tony appearances have racked up millions of views online, turning him into one of the most talked-about new voices in stand-up comedy. If you’re looking for a comedy show that’s completely unpredictable, wildly funny, and unlike anything you’ve seen before, Timmy No Brakes is your guy. Buckle up — this show is going to be a ride. Event Details Date: Friday, July 3, 2026 Time: 7:00 PM (Doors open at 5:30 PM) Venue: Pittsburgh Improv, 166 E. Bridge St, Homestead, PA 15120 Age Restriction: Ages 21 and up Additional Shows: A late show is also available at 9:30 PM on Friday, July 3, and two shows on Saturday, July 4 at 6:30 PM and 9:00 PM. About the Venue The Pittsburgh Improv is located at 166 E. Bridge Street in Homestead, PA — just minutes from downtown Pittsburgh. As part of the nationally recognized Improv Comedy Club chain, the Pittsburgh Improv is one of the premier comedy venues in the region. The club features a full-service restaurant and bar, making it a perfect destination for a complete night out. The intimate showroom seats approximately 300 guests, ensuring every seat has a great sightline to the stage. The venue’s lively atmosphere is ideal for the kind of high-energy comedy that Timmy No Brakes delivers. Parking is available nearby, and the venue is easily accessible from major highways. Note that this show falls on the July 4th holiday weekend, so plan ahead for traffic and parking. The Pittsburgh Improv is known for bringing top national touring comedians to the Pittsburgh area. What to Expect Timmy No Brakes delivers a stand-up performance that is completely unhinged, wildly energetic, and absolutely hilarious. This is a solo stand-up show — expect 60–75 minutes of non-stop, unpredictable comedy that will have you in tears. His shows are known for being spontaneous and electric. Timmy’s comedy blends absurdist character work with rapid-fire observations and crowd interaction. No two shows are the same, and Pittsburgh audiences are in for a treat on the July 4th holiday weekend. Please note: This is an ages 21 and up event. Valid ID is required at the door. Third-party tickets will not be honored — purchase only from authorized sellers. Unlike traditional comedy shows featuring a single headliner, Comedy Cellar presents a carefully curated lineup of professional comedians every night. The 300-seat showroom offers excellent sightlines and an intimate setting that allows audiences to experience stand-up comedy exactly as it was meant to be seen: up close and personal. item.title: Thank You Miami Stand Up Comedy Show (Friday)
item.description:
Friday, July 3, 2026 at 9 PM

Location: Thank You Miami Cocina & Beer House, 1701 West Flagler Street, #Suite 101, Miami, FL, 33135, United States

Kick off Friday right: craft beers on tap, late-night bites & Miami’s funniest comics. Laugh, sip & start your weekend like a local legend. You Can’t Go Wrong On A Friday Night By Doing Something Different. Laughs. Craft Beers. And a dining menu that satisfies the munchies: https://thankyoumiami.godaddysites.com/menu Skip the lines at nightclubs and the overpriced cocktails — start your weekend with a local comedy night that’s pure Miami. Tickets & Seating 🎟 First Come, First Serve Free entry Seating not guaranteed — show up early for the good spots 🍻 Guaranteed Preferred Seating + BOGO Drinks — $25 Guaranteed main-area seating during showtime Buy-One-Get-One-Free drinks 👕 Guaranteed Preferred Seating + BOGO Drinks + T-Shirt — $35 Everything above, plus a limited-edition Miami Comedy T-shirt. Look like you’ve been here since day one, even if it’s your first Friday. (Because space is limited, seated guests are asked to order at least one drink or menu item. Easy.) Looking for a Promo Code? Text “MIAMI” to (786) 610-5571 Celebrate 10 Years of Laughter with the Miami Comedy Anniversary Shirt! Celebrate a decade of laughs with the Miami Comedy 10-Year Anniversary Shirt! This exclusive, limited-edition design marks a milestone in our journey of bringing joy to Miami. Every purchase supports the Miami Comedy community, helping us grow and continue spreading laughter across the city. This collectible shirt is one-of-a-kind—once it’s sold out, it’s gone forever. Don’t miss your chance to own a stylish piece of Miami comedy history and be part of something truly special. Grab yours now and celebrate 10 years of laughs with us! Sizes S – XL available. Media Watch all our videos about Thank You Miami Comedy Night: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLWygUR7TT1rBo8XBgJ9aP2M4ZkLc8uAbd See all the fun we’re having on this show! Photos available here: https://miamicomedy.com/tag/thank-you-miami+photography/ About Thank You Miami Beer House and Cocina. Thank You Miami Beer House and Cocina is the newest hip bar located in Flagler and 17th. This bar gives thanks to the city by offering a large selection of beers and food as well as LIVE entertainment. About Miami Comedy MiamiComedy.com has produced independent comedy events for years. Over time we’ve built a platform where you can laugh everyday in Miami! We present to you authentic local and national performers and curate entertaining live shows for locals who love to laugh and enjoy the true art of stand up comedy. As seen on Amazon Prime Video “Respect the Light” the Miami New Times, Culture Crusaders, the Miami Improv and UNATION. We create unforgettably funny pop up shows all over the Magic City, in all your favorite bars, restaurants, lounges, theaters and virtual! We make each experience unique with its own environment, line up, drinking, social groups and dining menus! Questions? Special Occasions? Event Planning? Birthdays? Get in contact with me here: Text: 786-610-5571 Email: manny@miamicomedy.com Chat: miamicomedy.com

It is an intimate comedy club featuring a full bar and restaurant where guests enjoy world-renowned and local comics in a lively, up-close setting. The venue also hosts Black Dog Pizza Arcade, a full-scale free-play retro arcade featuring more than 30 local craft beers. Seating is assigned based on date of purchase. A 2-item food or beverage minimum per person applies once seated, and there is an 18% service charge on all checks in the showroom. What to Expect Celebrate the 4th of July with a night of non-stop laughs as Benji Brown headlines Arlington Improv. Expect his signature urban humor, viral character work, and the high-energy delivery that has made him one of the most exciting comedians on the national touring circuit. This is an 18+ event. item.title: Comedy Cellar Las Vegas Showcase (Early)
item.description:
Saturday, July 4, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Comedy Cellar Las Vegas at Rio Hotel & Casino, 3700 W Flamingo Rd, Las Vegas, NV, 89103, United States

This post contains affiliate links. We may earn a commission at no extra cost to you. Official Tickets Resale Tickets Comedy Cellar Las Vegas brings one of the most legendary names in stand-up comedy to the heart of Las Vegas. Located inside the Rio Hotel & Casino, this intimate comedy club is the West Coast home of New York City’s world-famous Comedy Cellar, the venue that helped launch the careers of comedy icons including Dave Chappelle, Chris Rock, Jon Stewart, Ray Romano, Amy Schumer, Aziz Ansari, and countless others. Unlike traditional comedy shows featuring a single headliner, Comedy Cellar presents a carefully curated lineup of professional comedians every night. Audiences can expect multiple performers during each show, featuring a mix of nationally touring headliners, television favorites, Comedy Central veterans, Netflix performers, and rising stars from around the world. No two shows are exactly alike, making every visit a unique experience. Surprise drop-in appearances from major comedians performing elsewhere in Las Vegas have become part of the club’s reputation, giving audiences the chance to see comedy superstars in an intimate setting. Event Details Venue: Comedy Cellar Las Vegas at Rio Hotel & Casino Location: 3700 W Flamingo Rd, Las Vegas, NV 89103 Show Schedule: Nightly performances throughout the year Age Requirement: Recommended for audiences 18+ due to mature comedy content About the Venue Opened in 2018, Comedy Cellar Las Vegas was designed to recreate the atmosphere and energy of the original Greenwich Village club that has become one of the most respected comedy venues in the world. The 300-seat showroom offers excellent sightlines and an intimate setting that allows audiences to experience stand-up comedy exactly as it was meant to be seen: up close and personal. The venue combines the excitement of a Las Vegas night out with the authentic feel of a classic New York comedy club. Guests can enjoy a comfortable showroom environment while watching some of the best comedians working today perform in a setting that encourages spontaneity, crowd interaction, and unforgettable moments. Conveniently located inside the Rio Hotel & Casino just minutes from the Las Vegas Strip, the venue offers easy access for both tourists and local comedy fans. What to Expect Expect a fast-paced evening featuring multiple comedians performing throughout the show. The Comedy Cellar is known for showcasing a wide variety of comedic styles, from observational humor and storytelling to sharp social commentary, crowd work, and cutting-edge stand-up. Whether you’re discovering a future comedy star or watching a seasoned veteran perfect their craft, every show delivers the authentic comedy club experience that has made the Comedy Cellar one of the most respected brands in stand-up comedy. For comedy fans visiting Las Vegas, Comedy Cellar is widely considered one of the best places in the city to experience live stand-up comedy any night of the week.

item.title: Cynthia Lee Fontaine Presents: Drag Brunch at the Punch
item.description:
Saturday, July 18, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Punch Line Houston, 1204 Caroline Street, Houston, TX

Looking for the ultimate Houston drag brunch experience? Whether you're planning a bachelorette party, a birthday celebration, or just want a daytime drag show without the late-night crowd, this is your event. Drag Brunch at The Punch is a monthly extravaganza featuring fierce performances, sassy audience games, and unforgettable live drag performances ? paired with brunch cocktails, mimosas, and bites. The perfect daytime LGBTQ event for anyone who loves fabulous entertainment before sundown. Produced by RuPaul's Drag Race fan-favorite Cynthia Lee Fontaine, each show features Houston drag queens bringing show-stopping numbers, big laughs, and serious talent. Perfect for girls' day out, gay brunch, Pride celebrations, and anyone looking for a fun Saturday activity in Houston. No late nights required ? just good drinks, great queens, and the best drag brunch ticket in town. Grab your tickets now. Please note that Cynthia will not be making an appearance. IMPORTANT TIMES: 10:30 AM BOX OFFICE OPENS SEATING BEGINS AT 11:00AM - SHOWTIME IS AT 12:00PM This show is 18 & over with valid, government-issued photo ID. Cameras and video/audio recording devices are not permitted. $.25 per each ticket sold for a majority of events at Punch Line benefits Comedy Gives Back, a safety net for the comedy community. item.title: Cynthia Lee Fontaine Presents: Drag Brunch at the Punch
item.description:
Saturday, August 15, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Punch Line Houston, 1204 Caroline Street, Houston, TX

Looking for the ultimate Houston drag brunch experience? Whether you're planning a bachelorette party, a birthday celebration, or just want a daytime drag show without the late-night crowd, this is your event. Drag Brunch at The Punch is a monthly extravaganza featuring fierce performances, sassy audience games, and unforgettable live drag performances ? paired with brunch cocktails, mimosas, and bites. The perfect daytime LGBTQ event for anyone who loves fabulous entertainment before sundown. Produced by RuPaul's Drag Race fan-favorite Cynthia Lee Fontaine, each show features Houston drag queens bringing show-stopping numbers, big laughs, and serious talent. Perfect for girls' day out, gay brunch, Pride celebrations, and anyone looking for a fun Saturday activity in Houston. No late nights required ? just good drinks, great queens, and the best drag brunch ticket in town. Grab your tickets now. Please note that Cynthia will not be making an appearance. IMPORTANT TIMES: 10:30 AM BOX OFFICE OPENS SEATING BEGINS AT 11:00AM - SHOWTIME IS AT 12:00PM This show is 18 & over with valid, government-issued photo ID. Cameras and video/audio recording devices are not permitted. $.25 per each ticket sold for a majority of events at Punch Line benefits Comedy Gives Back, a safety net for the comedy community. item.title: Cynthia Lee Fontaine Presents: Drag Brunch at the Punch
item.description:
Saturday, September 19, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Punch Line Houston, 1204 Caroline Street, Houston, TX

Looking for the ultimate Houston drag brunch experience? Whether you're planning a bachelorette party, a birthday celebration, or just want a daytime drag show without the late-night crowd, this is your event. Drag Brunch at The Punch is a monthly extravaganza featuring fierce performances, sassy audience games, and unforgettable live drag performances ? paired with brunch cocktails, mimosas, and bites. The perfect daytime LGBTQ event for anyone who loves fabulous entertainment before sundown. Produced by RuPaul's Drag Race fan-favorite Cynthia Lee Fontaine, each show features Houston drag queens bringing show-stopping numbers, big laughs, and serious talent. Perfect for girls' day out, gay brunch, Pride celebrations, and anyone looking for a fun Saturday activity in Houston. No late nights required ? just good drinks, great queens, and the best drag brunch ticket in town. Grab your tickets now. Please note that Cynthia will not be making an appearance. IMPORTANT TIMES: 10:30 AM BOX OFFICE OPENS SEATING BEGINS AT 11:00AM - SHOWTIME IS AT 12:00PM This show is 18 & over with valid, government-issued photo ID. Cameras and video/audio recording devices are not permitted. $.25 per each ticket sold for a majority of events at Punch Line benefits Comedy Gives Back, a safety net for the comedy community. For more information, please visit www.comedygivesback.com Our events often run for multiple dates/times.
